title: SupportCase
description: A formal customer service inquiry, complaint, or request raised by a passenger or provider through the mobility platform's support system.

caseType.description: Type of support case (e.g. COMPLAINT, INQUIRY, TECHNICAL)

priority.description: Priority level of the case (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, URGENT)

reportedAt.description: Timestamp when the case was reported

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the case was resolved

orderId.description: Identifier of the contract/order against which support is required

ticketIds.description: Identifiers of any open support tickets
